exploration_notes: Created 3 files at /workspace/: pass_through_filter.h (filter header inheriting Http::StreamDecoderFilter), pass_through_filter.cc (implementation returning Continue from all decode methods), and config.cc (factory using Common::FactoryBase<google::protobuf::Empty> registered via REGISTER_FACTORY macro).
